programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E83.

programme.desc: Titoo helps his mischievous monkey friend return home after the town complaints increase. S03 E19.

programme.title: Dumb Wish-Haddi Mera Buddy
programme.desc: While cleaning, Billy finds a lamp in Grim's trunk and releases Grim's mother from it.

programme.title: Commissioner Ki Gaadi-Smaashhing Simmba
programme.desc: Upon uncovering Michael Money's scam, Simmba and Ricky decide to expose the con. S01 E13.

programme.desc: Simmba and friends devise a plan to catch the thief Sunday Monday for a huge reward. S01 E14.

programme.desc: When Lambu Bouna sneakily pickpockets Pillu Kaka, Simmba tries to stop him from escaping. S01 E15.

programme.desc: Simmba and his friends plan to stop High-tech Hunter from robbing the city museum. S01 E16.

programme.desc: Little Singham and his friends team up to defeat the forces threatening the planet.

programme.desc: Titoo discovers the 3Bs gang's plot to rob Lucky Home Society and decides to stop them. S03E20.

programme.desc: Dr J shares his evil idea of using the detention room to do away with Kris.

programme.title: Yaadaasht Khone Ka Drama-Titoo
programme.desc: The society secretary loses his memory after falling off a ladder.

programme.title: Baal Ka Kamal-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo convinces the townspeople to get the same haircut as Golu to reassure him.

programme.title: Titoo Kachori-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu team up to assist the local mill owners when their flour stock is pilfered.

programme.title: Fathers Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu's search for a gift for their father leads them to his diary.

programme.title: Titoo Bana Teacher-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito makes a plan to stop his teacher from completing the course.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Poonch-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's performance in a school fashion show catches Shera's attention.

programme.title: Bhaalu Ka Bachcha-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo assists a bear cub in safely coming back from the forest.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean and Teddy go on a holiday trip to but a little girl wants Teddy all to herself. S02E12.

programme.desc: Mr Bean tries to read the newspaper but it disappears when he tries to collect it. S02E13.

programme.desc: Mr Bean starts recording his video without realising it, which becomes popular. S02E14.

programme.desc: Mr Bean lands in trouble when he mistakenly suspects his neighbours of wrongdoings. S02E15.

programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes Scout Leader, but his obsession with badges leaves him unpopular. S02E16.
